summary: Tested 6 batch features: Referral & Gift Cards APIs, Security Headers (OWASP), StylePreview, PremiumLock & VariationSelector. All backend tests passed (19/19). Fixed VariationSelector NaN bug in GIF Maker. Frontend UI verified for Referral page, Gift Cards tab, Photo to Comic styles, and GIF Maker variations.

issues: Cloudflare beacon script blocked by CSP - non-critical, analytics only

critical_code_review_comments: All 6 Security Headers verified: CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy
Gift Cards API endpoints working: /api/referral/gift-cards/options (5 denominations), /api/referral/gift-cards/redeem, /api/referral/gift-cards/balance/{code}, /api/referral/gift-cards/my-cards
Dashboard has 'Referral & Gift Cards' link at /app/referral
Referral page shows: referral code, tier badge, stats grid, tier progress, how it works section
Gift Cards tab shows: redeem input, 5 purchase options with discount badges (SAVE 50%, POPULAR, BEST VALUE)
VariationSelector component working in GIF Maker after prop name fix
PremiumLock component exists with lock overlay and PRO badge
StylePreview component exists with preview images for 24 styles
context_for_next_testing_agent: Referral & Gift Cards system fully functional at /app/referral. All 6 features from batch implemented and tested. Security headers properly configured via server.py middleware. VariationSelector bug fixed - was using wrong prop names. Components verified: ReferralProgram.js, StylePreview.jsx, PremiumLock.jsx, VariationSelector.jsx. QA Report at /app/memory/QA_REPORT.md.

endpoints.GET /api/referral/code: 200 - Returns referral code with tier info

ui_elements: Stats grid (Total Referrals, Credits Earned, This Month, Pending)

headers.Content-Security-Policy: Full CSP with script-src, style-src, img-src, connect-src, frame-src directives

variation_selector.fix_applied: Added support for alternative prop names (baseCost/value/onChange)

fix_applied.issue: VariationSelector showing NaN credits in GIF Maker
fix_applied.root_cause: Prop name mismatch - component expected baseCredits/selectedVariation/onVariationSelect but GifMaker passed baseCost/value/onChange
fix_applied.fix: Added fallback prop handling with nullish coalescing operator
